mapper.select:
SELECT TCCT.BUYER_CD , TCCT.CONT_NUM , TCCT.CONT_CNT , TCCT.CONT_DESC , TCCT.CONT_TYPE , TCCT.PROGRESS_CD , TCCT.USER_NM AS USER_NM , TCCT.USER_ID AS USER_ID , TCCT.BIRTH_DATE AS BIRTH_DATE ,(SELECT GENDER FROM STOCTVUR WHERE USER_ID = TCCT.USER_ID)AS GENDER , TCCT.PHONE_NUM AS CELL_NUM , TCCT.JIKMU_NAME , TCCT.POSITION , TO_CHAR(TCCT.CONT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS CONT_DATE , TO_CHAR(TCCT.CONT_START_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS CONT_START_DATE , TO_CHAR(TCCT.CONT_END_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS CONT_END_DATE , TCCT.G_PLACE , SUBSTR(TCCT.WORK_TIME_START,1,2) AS WORK_TIME_START_HOUR , SUBSTR(TCCT.WORK_TIME_START,3,4) AS WORK_TIME_START_MIN , SUBSTR(TCCT.WORK_TIME_END,1,2) AS WORK_TIME_END_HOUR , SUBSTR(TCCT.WORK_TIME_END,3,4) AS WORK_TIME_END_MIN , SUBSTR(TCCT.REST_TIME,1,2) AS REST_TIME_HOUR , SUBSTR(TCCT.REST_TIME,3,4) AS REST_TIME_MIN , TCCT.SPECIAL_CONDITION , TCCT.WORK_CONDITION , TCCT.REST_CONDITION , TCCT.WORKER_PAY_AMT , TCCT.BASE_PAY , TCCT.BASE_PAY_RMKS , TCCT.LICENSE_PAY , TCCT.LICENSE_PAY_RMKS , TCCT.JOB_PAY , TCCT.JOB_PAY_RMKS , TCCT.EXTEND_PAY , TCCT.EXTEND_PAY_RMKS , TCCT.FOOD_PAY , TCCT.FOOD_PAY_RMKS , TCCT.WORK_PAY , TCCT.WORK_PAY_RMKS , TCCT.NIGHT_PAY , TCCT.NIGHT_PAY_RMKS , TCCT.ETC_PAY , TCCT.ETC_PAY_RMKS , TCCT.ETC_PAY2 , TCCT.ETC_PAY2_RMKS ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND UUID = TCCT.PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS PDF_ATT_FILE_CNT , TCCT.APP_DOC_NUM , TCCT.APP_DOC_CNT , TCRL.CONTRACT_TEXT_NUM , TCCT.VENDOR_ATT_FILE_NUM AS EMP_ATT_FILE_NUM , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = TCCT.GATE_CD AND UUID = TCCT.VENDOR_ATT_FILE_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS EMP_ATT_FILE_CNT , TCCT.G_ADDR1 , TCCT.G_ADDR2 , TCCT.JIKJONG_TYPE FROM STOCTCCT TCCT JOIN STOCTCRL TCRL ON (TCCT.GATE_CD = TCRL.GATE_CD AND TCCT.BUYER_CD = TCRL.BUYER_CD AND TCCT.CONT_NUM = TCRL.CONT_NUM AND TCCT.CONT_CNT = TCRL.CONT_CNT AND TCRL.FORM_SQ = '0' AND TCRL.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCECCF ECCF ON (TCRL.GATE_CD = ECCF.GATE_CD AND TCRL.FORM_NUM = ECCF.FORM_NUM AND ECCF.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE TCCT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND TCCT.BUNDLE_NUM = #{BUNDLE_NUM} AND TCCT.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND ECCF.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd}
AND TCCT.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND TCCT.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT}

SELECT TCCT.BUYER_CD , TCCT.CONT_NUM , TCCT.CONT_CNT ,(SELECT CONT_TYPE FROM STOCTCRL TCRL JOIN STOCECCF ECCF ON (TCRL.GATE_CD = ECCF.GATE_CD /** 2020.08.11 제외 AND TCRL.BUYER_CD = ECCF.BUYER_CD*/ AND TCRL.FORM_NUM = ECCF.FORM_NUM AND ECCF.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE TCRL.GATE_CD = TCCT.GATE_CD AND TCRL.BUYER_CD = TCCT.BUYER_CD AND TCRL.CONT_NUM = TCCT.CONT_NUM AND TCRL.CONT_CNT = TCCT.CONT_CNT AND TCRL.FORM_SQ = '0' AND TCRL.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS CONT_TYPE , TCCT.PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM FROM STOCTCCT TCCT WHERE TCCT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND TCCT.BUNDLE_NUM = #{BUNDLE_NUM} AND TCCT.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND TCCT.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND TCCT.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT}

SELECT CF.GATE_CD , CF.FORM_NUM , CF.FORM_NM , CF.BUYER_CD , CF.FORM_TEXT_NUM , CF.FORM_TYPE , CF.APPROVAL_FLAG , CF.BUNDLE_FLAG , CF.ECONT_FLAG , CF.CONT_TYPE AS CONTRACT_FORM_TYPE , (CF.AUTO_RENEW_FLAG, '0') AS AUTO_RENEW_FLAG , CF.FORM_FILE_NM , '0' AS FORM_SQ FROM STOCECCF CF WHERE CF.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND CF.FORM_TYPE = '100' -- 주서식(100), 부서식(200) AND CF.SIGN_STATUS = 'E' AND CF.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND CF.USE_FLAG = '1' AND CF.FORM_FILE_NM IN('CCPR1000' , 'CCPR1100','CCPR1600','CCPR1500')
AND CF.FORM_FILE_NM NOT IN ( 'CCTR1040_C00066', 'CCTR1070_C00066', 'CCTR1300' )
AND (CF.BUNDLE_FLAG, '0') = #{bundleFlag} --일괄계약 여부
AND CF.FORM_NUM = (SELECT MAX(FORM_NUM) FROM STOCTCRL WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND FORM_SQ = 0 -- 주서식 AND DEL_FLAG = '0')
AND CF.FORM_NUM = (SELECT (CASE WHEN MAX(RL.FORM_NUM) = 'FORM20080013' THEN (SELECT TEXT1 AS FORM_NUM FROM STOCCODD WHERE GATE_CD = '100' AND DEL_FLAG = '0' AND CODE_TYPE = 'NH0056' AND CODE = 'FORM20080013') WHEN MAX(RL.FORM_NUM) = 'FORM20080019' THEN (SELECT TEXT1 AS FORM_NUM FROM STOCCODD WHERE GATE_CD = '100' AND DEL_FLAG = '0' AND CODE_TYPE = 'NH0056' AND CODE = 'FORM20080019') WHEN MAX(RL.FORM_NUM) = 'FORM20080012' THEN (SELECT TEXT1 AS FORM_NUM FROM STOCCODD WHERE GATE_CD = '100' AND DEL_FLAG = '0' AND CODE_TYPE = 'NH0056' AND CODE = 'FORM20080012') ELSE MAX(RL.FORM_NUM) END) AS FORM_NUM FROM STOCTCRL RL WHERE RL.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND RL.BUYER_CD = #{PRE_BUYER_CD} AND RL.CONT_NUM = #{PRE_CONT_NUM} AND RL.CONT_CNT = #{PRE_CONT_CNT} AND RL.FORM_SQ = 0 -- 주서식 AND RL.DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY RL.FORM_NUM)
AND CF.FORM_NUM = (SELECT MAX(FORM_NUM) FROM STOCTCRL WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = #{PRE_BUYER_CD} AND CONT_NUM = #{PRE_CONT_NUM} AND CONT_CNT = #{PRE_CONT_CNT} AND FORM_SQ = 0 -- 주서식 AND DEL_FLAG = '0')
AND CF.FORM_NUM = (SELECT MAX(FORM_NUM) FROM STOCTCRL WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND CONT_NUM = (SELECT MAX(CONT_NUM) FROM STOCTCCT WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND BUNDLE_NUM = #{BUNDLE_NUM} AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AND FORM_SQ = 0 -- 주서식 AND DEL_FLAG = '0')
AND UPPER(CF.FORM_NM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BASIC_SEARCH}) '%'
AND (CF.BUYER_CD = (#{BUYER_CD}, #{ses.companyCd}) OR CF.NH_COMM_FLAG = '1')
AND (CF.BUYER_CD = ((#{BUYER_CD}, #{PRE_BUYER_CD}), #{ses.companyCd}) )
AND CF.BUYER_CD = ((#{BUYER_CD}, #{PRE_BUYER_CD}), #{ses.companyCd})
ORDER BY CF.BUYER_CD , CF.FORM_TYPE , CF.CONT_TYPE , CF.FORM_NM
mapper.update:
UPDATE STOCTCCT SET MOD_DATE = SYSDATE , MOD_USER_ID = #{ses.userId} , PROGRESS_CD = #{PROGRESS_CD} , CONT_DATE = #{CONT_DATE} , CONT_START_DATE = #{CONT_START_DATE} , CONT_END_DATE = #{CONT_END_DATE} , CONT_DESC = #{CONT_DESC} , CONT_REQ_CD = #{CONT_REQ_CD} , USER_ID = #{USER_ID} , USER_NM = #{USER_NM} , BIRTH_DATE = TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{BIRTH_DATE}),'YYYY-MM-DD') , PHONE_NUM = #{CELL_NUM} , JIKMU_NAME = #{JIKMU_NAME} , BUSINESS = #{JIKMU_NAME} , POSITION = #{POSITION} , G_PLACE = #{G_PLACE} , WORK_TIME_START = #{WORK_TIME_START} , WORK_TIME_END = #{WORK_TIME_END} , REST_TIME = #{REST_TIME} , SPECIAL_CONDITION = #{SPECIAL_CONDITION} , WORK_CONDITION = #{WORK_CONDITION} , REST_CONDITION = #{REST_CONDITION} , WORKER_PAY_AMT = #{WORKER_PAY_AMT} , BASE_PAY = DECODE(#{BASE_PAY},'null',0, TO_NUMBER(#{BASE_PAY})) , BASE_PAY_RMKS = (#{BASE_PAY_RMKS},'') , LICENSE_PAY = TO_NUMBER(#{LICENSE_PAY}) , LICENSE_PAY_RMKS = #{LICENSE_PAY_RMKS} , JOB_PAY = DECODE(#{JOB_PAY},'null',0, TO_NUMBER(#{JOB_PAY})) , JOB_PAY_RMKS = #{JOB_PAY_RMKS} , EXTEND_PAY = DECODE(#{EXTEND_PAY},'null',0, TO_NUMBER(#{EXTEND_PAY})) , EXTEND_PAY_RMKS = #{EXTEND_PAY_RMKS} , FOOD_PAY = DECODE(#{FOOD_PAY},'null',0, TO_NUMBER(#{FOOD_PAY})) , FOOD_PAY_RMKS = #{FOOD_PAY_RMKS} , WORK_PAY = DECODE(#{WORK_PAY},'null',0, TO_NUMBER(#{WORK_PAY})) , WORK_PAY_RMKS = #{WORK_PAY_RMKS} , NIGHT_PAY = DECODE(#{NIGHT_PAY},'null',0, TO_NUMBER(#{NIGHT_PAY})) , NIGHT_PAY_RMKS = #{NIGHT_PAY_RMKS} , ETC_PAY = DECODE(#{ETC_PAY},'null',0, TO_NUMBER(#{ETC_PAY})) , ETC_PAY_RMKS = #{ETC_PAY_RMKS} , ETC_PAY2 = DECODE(#{ETC_PAY2},'null',0, TO_NUMBER(#{ETC_PAY2})) , ETC_PAY2_RMKS = #{ETC_PAY2_RMKS} , ATT_FILE_NUM = #{ATT_FILE_NUM} , SIGN_STATUS = #{SIGN_STATUS} , BUNDLE_NUM = #{BUNDLE_NUM} , G_ADDR1 = #{G_ADDR1} , JIKJONG_TYPE = #{JIKJONG_TYPE}
WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND DEL_FLAG = '0'
